title: Leads
lede: Leads are your potential customers — people who have shown interest but haven't become customers yet. This guide shows you how to add, filter, tag, and convert them.

steps.title: Open the Leads list
steps.content:
1. In the left navigation, open CRM and click Leads (or go to /crm/leads).
  2. You'll see every lead in a searchable table with columns for Name, Email, Phone, Stage, Account, and Last Updated.
  3. Click any name or avatar to open that lead's full profile.

Think of a lead as a person who might buy from you. Once they do, you convert them into a Contact.

images.caption: The Leads list with search, filters, and stage tags
The Leads list with search, filters, and stage tags

steps.title: Add a new lead
steps.content:
1. Click the Create (New Lead) button at the top of the list.
  2. Enter the First Name and Last Name (both required).
  3. Add one or more addresses in the Emails field — the first one is the primary email.
  4. Click Add Phone Number to add a phone with a label (Mobile, Work, Home, etc.).
  5. Optionally set a Stage, link an Account (company), and fill in the address.
  6. Click Save.

steps.title: Search, filter, and sort
steps.content:
• Use the search box and switch the field between Name, Email, or Phone.
  • Add filters for Stage, Account, Source, Tags, Address, City, or Owner to narrow the list.
  • Click a column header (Name, Email, Stage, Last Updated) to sort by it.

steps.title: Tag and organize leads
steps.content:
• Open a lead and add tags (for example hot, follow-up, or a campaign name) to group similar leads.
  • Set the lead's Stage to track where it sits in your pipeline.
  • Use the Tags filter on the list to instantly pull up everyone with a given tag.

steps.title: Bulk actions and convert to contacts
steps.content:
1. Tick the checkboxes next to leads (or select all matching your filters).
  2. From the bulk toolbar you can Delete, Assign to an Account, Change Owner, or Convert to Contacts.
  3. Convert to Contacts promotes chosen leads into your Contacts list once they become real customers.
  4. Use Find Duplicates (by phone or email) to clean up repeated records.

metaDescription: Add, filter, tag, and convert leads in the iMash CRM. Track potential customers by stage, search by name, email or phone, and bulk-convert to contacts.
